channel.title: Quotes on un01s notes
channel.description: Recent content in Quotes on un01s notes

item.title: LOTR
item.description:
The moment was all, the moment was enough. – Virginia Woolf

Good things make choices difficult, bad things leave no choice. – Michelle Cohen Corasanti, The Almond Tree

some sw tools

  • little snitch: network monitor

  • quien: better than whois

  • quien github code in Go

  • screen recorder: himi-recorder

  • screen recorder Recordly

  • KEYBOARD sound museum

  • hacking tools

LOTR text internet archive

  • Evil fucks up because evil people fundamentally cannot imagine that others are not motivated by the same things as them.

item.title: Henry Ford's Quotes
item.description:
Came across several quotes from Henry Ford:

Money doesn’t change men, it merely unmasks them. If a man is naturally selfish or arrogant or greedy, the money brings that out.

Wealth, like happiness, is never attained when sought after directly. It comes as a by-product of providing a useful service.

The best way to make money is to stop thinking about making money and start thinking about serving people.

item.title: Some Interesting Bits
item.description:
• I whispered in his ear “I love you” he said delighted: “repeat it in my other ear so I regain my balance…”

  • If I had more time I would written a shorter letter. – Cicero

  • I always feel that a man and a woman who do not like the same films will eventually divorce. – Jean-luc Godard
